summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json to record the feature request as 'pending'. No actual implementation changes were made to Header.tsx, Hero.tsx, or Footer.tsx. REQ-1 requires preserving the logo appearance in those components, but since the requirement is to make no changes, the absence of modifications to those files could be interpreted as compliance. However, the feature request status remains 'pending', indicating the work has not been completed or verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Keep the KopdeGoa logo exactly as it currently appears in the Header, Hero, and Footer components — do not alter its size, styling, transparency, positioning, or any other visual properties.
